ddls:
CREATE TABLE "code_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each code file */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the code file within the project */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project containing the file */,
  "language" TEXT /* Programming language of the code file */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the file in bytes */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Last modified timestamp of the file */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation timestamp of the file */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the file is currently active or has been deleted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_code_files_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the software project */,
  "repository_url" TEXT /* URL to the project's repository */,
  "default_language" TEXT /* Default programming language of the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation timestamp of the project */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Last modified timestamp of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, archived) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the class */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the file containing the class */,
  "start_line" INTEGER /* Starting line number of the class in the file */,
  "end_line" INTEGER /* Ending line number of the class in the file */,
  "is_abstract" INTEGER /* Indicates if the class is abstract */,
  "is_final" INTEGER /* Indicates if the class is final */,
  "is_static" INTEGER /* Indicates if the class is static */,
  "is_interface" INTEGER /* Indicates if the class is an interface */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation timestamp of the class */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Last modified timestamp of the class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classes_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES code_files ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the method */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the class containing the method */,
  "start_line" INTEGER /* Starting line number of the method in the file */,
  "end_line" INTEGER /* Ending line number of the method in the file */,
  "complexity" INTEGER /* Cyclomatic complexity of the method */,
  "is_static" INTEGER /* Indicates if the method is static */,
  "is_final" INTEGER /* Indicates if the method is final */,
  "return_type" TEXT /* Return type of the method */,
  "access_modifier" TEXT /* Access modifier of the method (e.g., public, private, protected) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation timestamp of the method */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Last modified timestamp of the method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_methods_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variables" (
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variable */,
  "variable_name" TEXT /* Name of the variable */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the method containing the variable */,
  "usage_count" INTEGER /* Count of how many times the variable is used */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the variable */,
  "is_static" INTEGER /* Indicates if the variable is static */,
  "is_final" INTEGER /* Indicates if the variable is final */,
  "is_used" INTEGER /* Indicates if the variable is used */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation timestamp of the variable */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Last modified timestamp of the variable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variable_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variables_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES methods ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "method_calls" (
  "call_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each method call */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the method making the call */,
  "called_method_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the method being called */,
  "call_type" TEXT /* Type of method call (e.g., static, dynamic) */,
  "call_context" TEXT /* Context in which the method is called (e.g., loop, conditional) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation timestamp of the method call */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Last modified timestamp of the method call */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("call_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_method_calls_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_method_calls_called_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("called_method_id") REFERENCES methods ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the file where the issue is found */,
  "line_number" INTEGER /* Line number in the file where the issue occurs */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the issue */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the issue */,
  "issue_type" TEXT /* Type of issue (e.g., bug, code smell, unused variable) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the issue (e.g., open, closed, in progress) */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* Reference to the user assigned to fix the issue */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation timestamp of the issue */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Last modified timestamp of the issue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES code_files ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commits" (
  "commit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each commit */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the commit belongs to */,
  "commit_hash" TEXT /* Unique hash of the commit */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the commit */,
  "commit_date" TEXT /* Date when the commit was made */,
  "message" TEXT /* Commit message describing the changes */,
  "commit_type" TEXT /* Type of commit (e.g., fix, feature, refactor) */,
  "commit_scope" TEXT /* Scope of the commit (e.g., critical, minor) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation timestamp of the commit */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Last modified timestamp of the commit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("commit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commits_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_fixes" (
  "fix_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the fix event */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the issue being fixed */,
  "commit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the commit that fixes the issue */,
  "fix_type" TEXT /* Type of fix (e.g., bug fix, refactoring) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation timestamp of the fix event */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Last modified timestamp of the fix event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fix_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_fixes_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_fixes_commit_id FOREIGN KEY ("commit_id") REFERENCES commits ("commit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the project (e.g., developer, reviewer, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation timestamp of the user */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Last modified timestamp of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the file being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the file */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the file was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation timestamp of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES code_files ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
